problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
